AI Reliability & App Rescue

Stop the Bleeding.
Fix Your AI App.

Failing AI app, hallucinating RAG, or a half-finished vibe-coded build? Our SWAT team audits, fixes, and stabilises it — with a 99.9% uptime SLA on maintenance.

Free diagnostic audit. No commitment to proceed.

Who It's For

Who Is AI Reliability & App Rescue Built For?

Teams with a Broken AI Build

Your AI app is in production but performing badly — hallucinating, crashing, or losing users. You need it fixed fast.

Founders Burned by Agencies

An agency or offshore team delivered a half-built mess. We audit what's there, salvage what works, and complete the build.

CTOs Managing Legacy AI Debt

Technical debt has accumulated across your AI stack. You need a structured audit and a clear path to stability.

How It Works

How Does the AI App Rescue Process Work?

01Days 1–3

Deep Audit

Our SWAT team audits your full codebase, AI architecture, RAG pipeline, and production logs. You receive a prioritised diagnostic report — every bug, bottleneck, and risk mapped.

  • Codebase + AI layer reviewed
  • Prioritised fix list delivered
  • No commitment to proceed required
02Weeks 1–2

Fix & Stabilise

We resolve hallucinations, performance regressions, and critical P1 bugs systematically. Every fix is peer-reviewed and regression-tested before it goes near production.

  • Hallucination & RAG accuracy fixes
  • Performance & uptime restoration
  • Peer-reviewed before each deploy
03Month 1 onwards

Ongoing Maintenance

We stay on as your reliability partner — proactive monitoring, patching, and continuous optimisation. Named engineer, guaranteed SLA, no surprises.

  • Named engineer on your account
  • Proactive monitoring & alerting
  • 99.9% uptime SLA guarantee

What We Fix

What Does Kovil AI Fix in a Rescue Engagement?

LLM Hallucinations

RAG pipelines returning fabricated answers, incorrect citations, or context misalignment — traced, tuned, and resolved.

Performance Regressions

Slow inference, high latency, unscalable architectures — we profile, optimise, and load-test before declaring it fixed.

P1 Production Bugs

Critical failures in AI workflows, broken integrations, or cascading errors in agent pipelines — triaged and fixed fast.

Half-Finished Vibe Builds

Received a half-built app from an agency or AI tool? We audit what exists, rescue what's salvageable, and complete it properly.

Reliability & Uptime Gaps

Flaky deployments, missing error handling, no observability — we build the reliability layer your AI app was missing.

Security & Data Risks

Exposed API keys, prompt injection vulnerabilities, insecure data pipelines — identified and hardened as part of the audit.

What to Expect

What Should You Expect from an AI App Rescue?

Day 1
Day 1

Intake Call & NDA Signed

We hop on a call, understand your situation, sign an NDA, and get read access to your codebase and production logs. Urgent cases can start same day.

Days 1–3
Days 1–3

Full Diagnostic Audit

Our SWAT team audits your codebase, AI architecture, RAG pipeline, and production metrics. Every bug, bottleneck, and risk is mapped and prioritised.

Day 3–4
Day 3–4

Diagnostic Report Delivered

You receive a prioritised fix list with severity ratings, root cause analysis, and a recommended remediation plan. No commitment required to proceed.

Weeks 1–2
Weeks 1–2

Fix & Stabilise

We resolve P1 bugs, hallucinations, performance regressions, and structural issues — peer-reviewed and regression-tested before every deploy.

Month 1+
Month 1+

Ongoing Maintenance (Optional)

Stay on a reliability retainer — proactive monitoring, patching, and a 99.9% uptime SLA with a named engineer on your account.
